name: Feynman Mode evaluates explanation and shows gap analysis
description: User selects a topic, writes an explanation of at least 50 characters, submits for AI evaluation, and receives color-coded gap analysis with probing questions.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Feynman Mode link in the sidebar
Select a topic from the topic dropdown selector
Type an explanation of at least 60 characters in the explanation textarea
Click the Evaluate with AI button
Verify that after loading completes, the page displays a gap analysis section with colored segments (green, amber, or red indicators) and at least one probing question
